zh.lifeSummary: 當Calvagh O'Donnell Lord of Tyrconnell於1515年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 迪拉利多聶加爾時，他的父親Manus  Mhor O'Donnell14歲，母親Judith Ni ÓNéill23歲。他於大約1536年與Lady Eleanor FitzGerald結婚。他於1561年登記服兵役。他去世於1566年10月26日在愛爾蘭庫迪 隆多德利戴利享年51歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Calvagh O'Donnell Lord of Tyrconnell于1515年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 迪拉利多聶加爾时，他的父亲Manus  Mhor O'Donnell14岁，母亲Judith Ni ÓNéill23岁。他于大约1536年与Lady Eleanor FitzGerald结婚。他于1561年登记服兵役。他去世于1566年10月26日在爱尔兰庫迪 隆多德利戴利享年51岁，埋葬在爱尔兰。

nameMeanings.name: O'Donnell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Brigid, Niall, Siobhan, Brennan, Bridie, Declan, Donal, Fergus, Jarlath, John Patrick, Padraic.

Irish (Donegal, Munster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Domhnaill ‘descendant of Domhnall’, an old personal name composed of the Celtic elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Compare the Anglicized form Donald and the Scottish clan name McDonald .

History: The O'Donnells, like the O'Neills (see   O'Neill  ), claim descent from Niall of the Nine Hostages (Niall Noígíallach), a legendary 5th-century king of Ireland. Their traditional base is Tyrconnell (i.e. Donegal).

variants.name: O'Daniel
meanings: Irish: variant of   O'Donnell  , influenced by the Biblical name   Daniel  , to which it is etymologically unrelated.

variants.name: O'Donald
meanings: Irish: Scotticized form of O'Donnell . The Irish personal name Domhnall was Latinized as Donaldus, which is the source of Donald, the form of the personal name used in English in Scotland, though not in Ireland. The form O'Donald is therefore a 19th-century hybrid. Compare Donald .

variants.name: Donald
meanings: Scottish: shortened form of McDonald (Mac Dhomhnaill), from the Gaelic personal name Domhnall; found in 13th- and 14th-century Scotland as Dofnald, Douenald, Dufenald, and Donald.
Irish (Ulster): possibly also a shortened and altered form of Irish   O'Donell  .

nameMeanings.name: Calvagh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.description: Henry VIII dies, succeeded by the boy king Edward VI. England and Ireland were ruled by the senior nobility of England.

en.lifeSummary: When Calvagh O'Donnell Lord of Tyrconnell was born in 1515, in Donegal, County Tipperary, Ireland, his father, Manus  Mhor O'Donnell, was 14 and his mother, Judith Ni ÓNéill, was 23. He married Lady Eleanor FitzGerald about 1536. He registered for military service in 1561. He died on 26 October 1566, in Derry, County Londonderry, Ireland, at the age of 51, and was buried in Ireland.

fr.Portnatrynod Castle, Strabane, Tyrone, N: Strabane, County Tyrone, Irlande du Nord, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Calvagh O'Donnell Lord of Tyrconnell est né en 1515, à Donegal, County Tipperary, Irlande, son père, Manus  Mhor O'Donnell, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Judith Ni ÓNéill, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Lady Eleanor FitzGerald environ 1536. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1561. Il est décédé le 26 octobre 1566, à Derry, County Londonderry, Irlande, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Irlande.

de.Portnatrynod Castle, Strabane, Tyrone, N: Strabane, County Tyrone, Nordirland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Calvagh O'Donnell Lord of Tyrconnell 1515 in Donegal, County Tipperary, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Manus  Mhor O'Donnell 14 und seine Mutter Judith Ni ÓNéill 23. Er hat um 1536 Lady Eleanor FitzGerald geheiratet. Er hat sich 1561 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 26. Oktober 1566 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Derry, County Londonderry, Irland und wurde in Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Calvagh O'Donnell Lord of Tyrconnell è nato il nel 1515 nel Donegal, County Tipperary, Irlanda, il suo padre, Manus  Mhor O'Donnell, aveva 14 anni e il suo madre, Judith Ni ÓNéill, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Lady Eleanor FitzGerald circa 1536. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1561. Morì il 26 ottobre 1566, nel Derry, County Londonderry, Irlanda, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Calvagh O'Donnell Lord of Tyrconnellが1515年にアイルランドコウントイ ティップエラリードンエガルで生まれた時，父Manus  Mhor O'Donnellは14歳，母Judith Ni ÓNéillは23歳であった。約1536年にLady Eleanor FitzGeraldと結婚した。彼は1561年に兵役登録をした。彼は1566年10月26日にアイルランドコウントイ ロンドンデリーデリーで51歳で死去し，アイルランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Calvagh O'Donnell Lord of Tyrconnell(이)가 1515년 아일랜드 카운티 티페라리 도네걸에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Manus  Mhor O'Donnell(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 Judith Ni ÓNéill(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1536년 Lady Eleanor FitzGerald(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1561년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1566년 10월 26일 아일랜드 카운티 런도더리 더리에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Calvagh O'Donnell Lord of Tyrconnell nasceu em 1515, em Donegal, County Tipperary, Irlanda, seu pai, Manus  Mhor O'Donnell, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Judith Ni ÓNéill, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Eleanor FitzGerald aproximadamente 1536. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1561. Ele faleceu em 26 de outubro de 1566, em Derry, County Londonderry, Irlanda, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Irlanda.

ru.Portnatrynod Castle, Strabane, Tyrone, N: страбан, коунти тироун, Северная Ирландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Calvagh O'Donnell Lord of Tyrconnell родился в 1515 г. в местности доунегаль, коунти типпирэри, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Manus  Mhor O'Donnell было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Judith Ni ÓNéill, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Eleanor FitzGerald около 1536 г. В 1561 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 26 октября 1566 г. в местности дирри, коунти лондондирри, Ирландия в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности Ирландия.
